footer.tagline: Guiding Malaysian SPM students to the right course.

landing.heroSubtitle: Discover the right path for your future based on your SPM results. Get personalised recommendations from over 300 courses across polytechnics, universities, and TVET institutions.
landing.step1Desc: Tell us your SPM results and we'll find courses you're eligible for.
landing.step2Desc: Answer a few questions about what you enjoy to get personalised matches.
landing.step3Desc: See courses ranked by how well they fit your profile and preferences.
landing.readySubtitle: Join thousands of SPM leavers who have found their ideal course using HalaTuju.

onboarding.streamSubtitle: This helps us show you the right subjects for grade entry.
onboarding.gradesSubtitle: Enter your SPM grades to check course eligibility.
onboarding.enterAllCore: Please enter grades for all core subjects.
onboarding.profileSubtitle: Some courses have specific requirements. This helps us filter accurately.
onboarding.healthNote: Some courses have health requirements. Check if any apply to you.
onboarding.examTypeSubtitle: Select the exam you took to get started.
onboarding.gradesSubtitleNew: Enter your grades so we can find courses that match your results.
onboarding.profileSubtitleNew: A few more details to personalise your recommendations.
onboarding.coqHint: Enter your co-curricular marks (0 to 10) from your school.

dashboard.title: Your Course Recommendations
dashboard.subtitle: Based on your SPM grades and profile, here are courses you qualify for.
dashboard.rankedSubtitle: Ranked by how well they match your interests and preferences.
dashboard.noProfileDesc: Please complete the onboarding to see your recommendations.
dashboard.quizDesc: Answer 6 quick questions about your interests and preferences.
dashboard.quizDone: Quiz completed — courses ranked by your preferences
dashboard.failedToLoad: Failed to load recommendations. Please try again.
dashboard.reportDesc: Get a personalised career guidance report from our AI counsellor, based on your grades and eligible courses.
dashboard.reportError: Failed to generate report. Please try again.

search.title: Explore Courses
search.subtitle: Browse all courses across polytechnics, universities, and TVET institutions.
search.searchPlaceholder: Search for courses, institutions, or fields (e.g. Computer Science, UM)...
search.noCourses: No courses found matching your criteria.
search.tryDifferent: Try different filters or search terms.
search.eligibleToggleDesc: Only show courses I qualify for

login.signInSubtitle: Sign in to continue to your recommendations

settings.languageDesc: Choose your preferred language for the interface.
settings.clearDataDesc: Remove your saved grades, stream selection, and quiz answers from this device. Your account and saved courses are not affected.
settings.clearConfirm: Are you sure you want to clear all your profile data? You will need to re-enter your grades.
settings.dataCleared: All profile data has been cleared.
settings.builtBy: Built by the Tamil Foundation for Malaysian students.

courseDetail.careerPathwaysDesc: Jobs this course can lead to (MASCO classified)
courseDetail.notFound: We couldn't find the course you're looking for.
courseDetail.noInstitutions: Institution information not available for this course.

saved.title: Saved Courses
saved.signInPrompt: Sign in to save and view your favourite courses.
saved.empty: You haven't saved any courses yet.

authGate.title: Create Your Free Account
authGate.quizReason: Create a free account to get personalised course rankings based on your interests.
authGate.saveReason: Create a free account to save your shortlist and access it from any device.
authGate.reportReason: Create a free account to get your free AI counsellor report.
authGate.eligibleReason: Create a free account to filter courses by your eligibility.
authGate.benefit2: Save and compare your shortlisted courses
authGate.almostDone: Almost done! Tell us a little about yourself.

profile.title: My Profile
profile.subtitle: Manage your personal information and course interests
profile.noCourses: Save courses from the dashboard to track them here

outcomes.title: My Applications
outcomes.empty: You haven't tracked any applications yet.
outcomes.emptyHint: Save a course and tap "I Applied" to start tracking.
outcomes.confirmDelete: Are you sure you want to remove this application record?
outcomes.trackApplicationsDesc: Record your offers and acceptances to help us improve HalaTuju.
outcomes.noSavedCourses: Save some courses first, then track your applications here.
